title: Internet X.509 Public Key Infrastructure - Algorithm Identifiers for the Module-Lattice-Based Key-Encapsulation Mechanism (ML-KEM)
source: Limited Additional Mechanisms for PKIX and SMIME
abstract: The Module-Lattice-Based Key-Encapsulation Mechanism (ML-KEM) is a quantum-resistant Key Encapsulation Mechanism.  This document specifies the conventions for using the ML-KEM in X.509 Public Key Infrastructure.  The conventions for the subject public keys and private keys are also specified.
